posts.author: Lennie (Lennie Axelsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to be able to se and manage tracked time in the calendar view.

  • I would like to be able to set up a calendar view where all times tracked by me in all projects show up as a calendar entry.
  • I’d like to be able to both re-arrange and change the size (ie duration of time tracked) from this view.
  • It would also be very useful to be able to add time from this view.

This would help solve the issue of multiple tasks being mistakenly tracked at once. It also makes it very easy to see if I forgot to track time for a particular task I did during the day as there would be a gap.

posts.author: andrewm2 (Andrew M)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely! If time tracking is a native feature to boards, then it goes without saying that one should be able to have a bird’s eye view of recorded times on a calendar.

posts.author: lauragED (Laura Gil)
posts.cookedHtml:
I completely agree with you!

The feature is very much needed! Please Monday! Help us!

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lennie @lauragED @andrewm2 , I believe our MasterPlan Calendar could address most of what you’re looking for. It allows you to view and manage tasks and time blocks directly from the calendar, including creating, adjusting, and organizing items easily. It’s designed to make tracking and scheduling more intuitive across multiple projects.

Let me know if you’d like more details.
